label: Situation 1
situation: You are trekking alone and notice a fellow trekker has twisted his ankle 5 km from the base camp.

label: Situation 2
situation: You see a shop on fire. The shopkeeper is inside and people around are just watching.

label: Situation 3
situation: During a group project, you realise your team leader's plan has a serious flaw that will cause failure.

label: Situation 4
situation: You witness a road accident. The injured person needs immediate help but people are reluctant to help fearing legal trouble.

label: Situation 5
situation: Your friend confides that he has been cheating in exams. You are appearing for the same exam next week.

label: Situation 6
situation: You are in a bus. A passenger collapses suddenly. The driver says he cannot stop.

label: Situation 7
situation: You are on night duty. You find your senior is misusing government property.

label: Situation 8
situation: A classmate is being bullied by seniors in the hostel. He is too scared to complain.

label: Situation 9
situation: You find a wallet with cash and ID cards on the road. The owner's address is on the ID.

label: Situation 10
situation: During a river crossing exercise, a batch-mate panics in the middle of the river.

label: Situation 11
situation: You are leading a platoon and your radio stops working 3 km behind enemy lines.

label: Situation 12
situation: You discover that a supplier has been bribing an official to get a government contract.

label: Situation 13
situation: Your team is exhausted after a 20 km march. There is still 5 km left. Morale is very low.

label: Situation 14
situation: An elderly woman is being harassed on a crowded bus. Other passengers are ignoring it.

label: Situation 15
situation: You are giving a presentation to senior officers when you realise you have incorrect data.

label: Situation 16
situation: You are part of a rescue team. One of your colleagues refuses to proceed, citing danger.

label: Situation 17
situation: You discover your batch-mate has been leaking examination papers to others.

label: Situation 18
situation: A fire breaks out in the camp kitchen at midnight. Most personnel are asleep.

label: Situation 19
situation: You are in charge of supplies. You find 20% of rations are spoiled and troops are hungry.

label: Situation 20
situation: During a flood relief operation, locals are fighting over relief material.
